_comment: Copy to config.json and fill every {{PLACEHOLDER}}. The onboarding skill fills the per-rep placeholders interactively. Everything Testsigma-wide (company, product, personas, proof points, voice, sender rule, process toggles) is already filled in for you. config.json is gitignored so your personal details never get committed. Every field exists because getting it wrong caused a real problem in a live BDR system.

company.name: Testsigma
company.one_liner: Agentic AI-powered, unified test automation platform: write tests in plain English and AI creates, runs, and heals them across web, mobile, API, desktop, Salesforce, and SAP.
key_value_props: Flaky or brittle tests: AI self-healing fixes broken tests when the UI changes (proof: Hansard cut regression from 8 weeks to 5).
Too much time creating and running tests: plain-English authoring plus parallel execution (proof: Medibuddy ran 2,500 tests with roughly a 50% maintenance cut).
Can't scale coverage: NLP plus an AI agent plus cross-browser (proof: CRED reached 90% regression coverage, 5x faster).

product_glossary._comment: Terms your agent should know so it never mis-describes the product.
product_glossary.Atto: The AI-coworker suite of agents: Generator, Sprint Planner, Runner, Analyzer, Healer, and Optimizer.
product_glossary.Atto 2.0: The Nov 2025 release: intent-based self-healing, coverage discovery, and risk analysis.
product_glossary.NLP: Natural-language authoring: write tests in plain English.
product_glossary.Copilot: GenAI assistant that generates tests from prompts, Figma, Jira, or screenshots.
product_glossary.Self-healing: AI auto-fixes broken locators and tests when the UI changes; up to roughly 90% maintenance reduction.

icp._comment: Persona precision matters more than anything. Enrichment tools mis-classify seniority; the TITLE TEXT rules. Keep a title only if it contains Manager, Director, VP, Vice President, Head, or Chief AND is not a Lead/Senior/Principal/Staff/IC pattern. Example: 'Senior Software Engineering Manager' KEEPS (Manager wins); 'Senior Software Engineer' DROPS.
personas_secondary: VP Engineering / CTO (only with buyer intent)

scope._comment: The bounded pool the agent may prospect (TAM-only). Off-list = stop.
authorized_exception_sources: buyer-intent signal accounts (the only approved exception to the TAM-only rule)

_proof_points_comment: These three proof stories are external-safe and ship in outreach. Use ONE clean named-proof line per message. The 'verticals' tag = which of our target verticals the proof resonates with for routing; it is not a claim about the customer's own industry.

proof_points.metric: cut regression testing from 8 weeks to 5

proof_points.value_prop: too much time creating/running tests -> plain English + parallel execution
can't scale coverage -> NLP + AI agent + cross-browser

hard_rules: no em dashes anywhere, including subject lines
ask, never assert: open with a diagnostic question grounded in a verified fact about their product or company
never a claim about the prospect's feelings, career, or experience
sign-off is 'Best,' then a newline then your first name

cta_rules._comment: CTA style differs by motion. Getting this wrong tanks reply rates.
cta_rules.cold_outbound: meeting ask in the 'What day works' style, OUTBOUND ONLY
cta_rules.inbound: engagement-first, NO meeting ask; reference the inbound action and ask one low-friction question
cta_rules.warm_followup: soft next-step tied to their reply, no hard meeting push

sender_domain_rule._comment: Testsigma-wide rule: all outreach sends from the rep's .ai address. The .com address is exception-only.
sender_domain_rule.exception_only: {{WORK_EMAIL}} (.com) for rare, direct, fully-customized replies to a warm or inbound prospect, e.g. someone who asked for a demo

sender_rules_by_sequence._comment: Default is the .ai address for all sequences; override here only for a specific motion.

sequence_ids._comment: YOUR tool's IDs. Never commit real IDs to a shared repo; they live in gitignored config only.

research._comment: Non-negotiables that keep quality high and prevent fabrication.

quota.sal_definition: SAL = intro call to demo that converts to a BANT-qualified opportunity the team pursues with a good chance of winning

guardrails.approval_model: batch: build all drafts, run per-draft QC, present one batch review, get a single APPROVE SEND, then execute the send-all autonomously
guardrails.batch_intake_routing: survey the rep's existing sequences FIRST, then dispose each contact preferring a sequence with a manual email step > a sequence with an automated-template step > a LinkedIn step > a one-off manual email; ask ONE upfront multiple-choice question if routing is unclear
guardrails.linkedin_cr_research_gate: one live evidence file per candidate captured in main context; judge persona on the LIVE headline not enrichment; every activity hook must trace to a verbatim quote or be dropped; 2nd/3rd-degree only; per-row traceability; no JS-only connection-request sends on public profiles (use the Sales Navigator real-mouse flow with char-for-char readback)
